svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="月度恢复演练" id="monthly-drill"> <mxGraphModel dx="-534" dy="-158" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1150" pageHeight="420" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="s1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="① 隔离环境
建空 MySQL

绝不复用现网
不污染生产" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="160" x="30" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="② 全量 dump 恢复

mysql < dump.sql.gz
验证快照没损坏" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="160" x="230" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;fontStyle=1;" value="③ binlog PITR 接力

mysqlbinlog 按位点
恢复到故障前最后一刻
（最易出错的一步）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="160" x="430" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="④ 关键表对账

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM users/orders/...
验证与现网一致" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="160" x="630" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;fontStyle=1;" value="⑤ 报告归档
+ 门禁判定

失败 → 阻断发布" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="160" x="830" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f1" edge="1" parent="1" source="s1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" target="s2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f2" edge="1" parent="1" source="s2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" target="s3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f3" edge="1" parent="1" source="s3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" target="s4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f4" edge="1" parent="1" source="s4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" target="s5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rto" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f1f5f9;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="报告量化真实 RTO：从拉 dump 到对账通过的总耗时 → 校验「1 小时 RTO」承诺靠不靠谱" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="660" x="230" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="core" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="演练的价值不在「跑通」，在「暴露 PITR 接力/位点漂移/对账偏差」—— 这些只有真跑才暴露，真灾难来时才不会手忙脚乱" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="820" x="150" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="er" edge="1" parent="1" source="s5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="rto"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 55px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
① 隔离环境
建空 MySQL
绝不复用现网
不污染生产

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 55px; margin-left: 201px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
② 全量 dump 恢复
mysql < dump.sql.gz
验证快照没损坏

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 55px; margin-left: 401px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
③ binlog PITR 接力
mysqlbinlog 按位点
恢复到故障前最后一刻
（最易出错的一步）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 55px; margin-left: 601px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
④ 关键表对账
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM users/orders/...
验证与现网一致

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 55px; margin-left: 801px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
⑤ 报告归档
+ 门禁判定
失败 → 阻断发布

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 658px; height: 1px; padding-top: 178px; margin-left: 201px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 报告量化真实 RTO：从拉 dump 到对账通过的总耗时 → 校验「1 小时 RTO」承诺靠不靠谱

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 818px; height: 1px; padding-top: 242px; margin-left: 121px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 演练的价值不在「跑通」，在「暴露 PITR 接力/位点漂移/对账偏差」—— 这些只有真跑才暴露，真灾难来时才不会手忙脚乱
